$schema-note: Copy to ux-audit.config.json in your app repo. Every field is optional — these are the defaults.

severityOverrides._comment: Optionally re-rank categories for your product, e.g. force all accessibility findings to at least P1

_failOn-note: CI gate: exit code 1 if any finding at or above this severity. One of P0 | P1 | P2 | P3 | none.
_screens-note: Limit scope to specific screen names/paths. Empty = audit everything.
